---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
description: Suggest an improvement for the save sync tool / 给存档同步工具提功能建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 想解决的问题 / Problem

你希望这个功能解决什么痛点？
What problem should this feature solve?

## 建议方案 / Proposed solution

你希望工具怎么做？
How would you like the tool to work?

## 使用场景 / Use case

例如普通档和 Modded 档同步、多个 Profile、Steam 云存档、本地备份恢复等。
For example: normal/Modded sync, multiple profiles, Steam Cloud, local backup restore.

## 替代方案 / Alternatives

你现在是怎么绕过这个问题的？
How do you currently work around this?

## 补充信息 / Additional context

可以附截图、示例路径或相关链接。
You can attach screenshots, example paths, or related links.
